            407

            In which Surah of the Holy Quran, the word ” Khatimun Nabiyen ” is mentioned?

            Correct Answer: AL Ahzab
            Show explanation
            Explanation



            Al-Ahzab is the 33rd chapter of the Quran with 73 verses. The sūrah takes its name from the mention of the parties, or confederates, who fought the Muslims at the Battle of the Trench, also known as the Battle of the Parties and as the Siege of Madinah

            408

            In which Surah, Hijrat of the Holy Prophet ﷺ mentioned?

            Correct Answer: Anfal
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            "Hazrat Prophet SWS Migrated To Medina On 12 Rabiawal 13th nabvi 622ad 24 September,

            Surah Anfal Other names: The Spoils of War

            Surah Anfal verses no: 75"

            409

            What is the literal meaning of Aqeeda?

            Correct Answer: The tie of knot
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            Aqidah is an Islamic term of Arabic origin that literally means "creed".

            410

            Hazrat Umar was born on which hijri?

            Correct Answer: 584 AD
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            He (RA) was born in 584 AD

            He embraced martyrdom on 1st Muharram 23 AH.

            Hazrat Umar Farooq was martyred on 24 A.H 1st Muharram

            ****

            Full name: Umar ibn Al-Khattāb

            He was the second Rashidun caliph, ruling from August 634 until his assassination in 644 (13 to 24 Hijri).

            The wife of Prophet Muhammad (PBUH) Hazrat Hafsah (رضہ) was the daughter of Umar Farooq (R.A)


            411

            Hazrat Shees (A.S.) passed away at the age of:

            Correct Answer: 912 Years
            Show explanation
            Explanation
            • Hazrat Shees (A.S.) was the youngest son of Hazrat Adam (A.S.)
            • Hazrat Shees (A.S.) was the second Prophet of Allah.

                    One Day, Hazrat Adam (A.S.) got ill and called his son Shees (A.S.) and said: "O my son! Soon I am going to die as I         am not well. The Almighty God sent me a revelation to appoint you as my successor and prophet. Hazrat Shees             (A.S.) got ill at the age of 912 and made Anush his successor and ordered him to lead a pious and spiritual life."

            412

            What is known by “Zulfiqar”?

            Correct Answer: Sword of Hazrat Ali (R.A)
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            The Holy Prophet (PBUH) awarded a sword namely "Zulfiqar" to Hazrat Ali in the battle of Uhad.

            413

            There were _______ men and _______ women in the first migration to Abyssinia?

            Correct Answer: 12/4
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            The Migration to Abyssinia (Ethiopia) Dated 6 BH (613/14 CE).

            Start date: 613 AD

            Participants: A group of twelve men and four women

            The relatives of Prophet Muhammad (PBUH) in the first migration to Abyssinia were Usman Ghani (R.A) and Ruqaiyah (R.A)

            Also known as:Hijrah il-al-Habshah 

            The Ethiopian Empire also formerly known by the exonym Abyssinia

            414

            Name the first Muslim who was fully satisfied in the matter of Treaty of Hudaibiya?

            Correct Answer: Hazrat Abu Bakar (RA)
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            The Treaty of Hudaybiyyah was an event that took place during the time of the Islamic prophet Muhammad.

            It was a pivotal treaty between Muhammad, representing the state of Medina, and the Qurayshi tribe of Mecca 

            The treaty of Hudaibiyah was signed in 628 January

            while 

            Sulah Hudaibiya signed for 10 years

            Sulah e Hudaibiya is called Fatah Al-Mubeen in Surah Al-Fatah

            Treaty of Hudaybiyyah was concluded in 8th Hijri.

            415

            The relatives of Prophet (PBUH) in the first migration to Abyssinia were:

            Correct Answer: Usman (R.A) and Ruqayya (R.A)
            Show explanation
            Explanation
            • The relatives of the Prophet (PBUH) in the first migration to Abyssinia were: Usman (R.A) and Ruqayya (R.A)
            • ***
            • The first migration of the Companions and relatives of the Prophet Muhammad ﷺ was to Abyssinia (Ethiopia)
            • The Migration to Abyssinia Dated 6 BH (613/14 CE).
            • Start date: 613 AD
            • Participants: A group of twelve men and four women
            • Also known as:Hijrah il-al-Habshah 
            • ***
            • Abdul bin Zubair (R.A) was the first child born after the migration (hijrah)
            416

            Which surah of the Holy Quran starts with two fruits name?

            Correct Answer: Surah At-Teen
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            At-Tīn is the ninety-fifth sura of the Qur'an with 8 ayat.
            417

            Jerusalem was conquered by which caliph of Islam?

            Correct Answer: Hazrat Umer
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            Jerusalem is located in Israel.

            Jerusalem was conquered by Hazrat Umer caliph of Islam

            Area: 125.1 km²

            Founded: 3000 BC

            Population: 874,186 (2016) United Nations

            Jerusalem is considered by many to be one of the holiest places in the world.

            Jerusalem largest city in Israel.

            Jerusalem is a site of major significance for the three largest monotheistic religions:

            Judaism,

            Islam,

            Christianity

            both Israel and Palestine have claimed Jerusalem as a capital city.

            Israel captured the West Bank and East Jerusalem in the 1967 Middle East War.

            ND23-4-2023

            418

            شادی شدہ زانی کی سزا

            Correct Answer: رجم
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            رجم ایک عربی اصطلاح ہے جس کے معنی پتھر پھینکنے  کے آتے ہیں

            اور اس اصطلاح سے مراد ایک ایسی سزا کی لی جاتی ہے

            جس میں جرم کے مرتکب اشخاص کا دھڑ زمین میں گاڑ کر ان پر پتھر برسائے جائیں یہاں تک کے موت واقع ہو جائے

            نبی کریم صلی اللہ علیہ و سلم نے فرمایا۔

            شادی شدہ مرد اور عورت زناکریں تو دونوں کو سنگسار کردو یہ اللہ کی طرف سے سزا ہے۔ زانی ایمان کی حالت میں زنا نہیں کرتا ( یعنی جب وہ زنا کرتا ہے تو ایمان سے خالی ہوجاتا ہے)۔''

            ND-7-5-2023


            419

            غزوہ میں نبی صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ وسلم کے دندان مبارک شہید ہوئے

            Correct Answer: غزوہ احد
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            غزوہ احد 7 شوال 3 ہجری میں لڑی گئی

            جنگ مدینہ کے مسلمانوں اور مکہ کی قریش کے قبائل کے درمیان لڑی گئی

            اس جنگ میں مسلمانوں کی تعداد 1000 جبکہ کفار کی تعداد تین ہزار تھی

            غزوہ بدر کا قرآن مجید میں سورۃ آل عمران کی آیت نمبر 121میں موجود ہے

            420

            Which one of the following is the title of Hazrat Musa (A.S)?

            Correct Answer: Kale mullah
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            کلام کا مطلب ہے گفتگو کرنا، چونکہ حضرت موسیؑ اللہ تعالی سے کوہ طور پر کلام کیا کرتے تھے

            اسی وجہ انہیں کلیم اللہ بھی کہا جاتا ہے۔

            Bibi Safoora the wife of (Prophet Moosa) was the daughter of Prophet:  Hazrat Shoaib A.S

            Hazrat Musa also known as Kaleemullah was one of 124,000 prophets of God.

            Moses, also known as Moshe Rabbenu

            Hazrat Musa was granted 9 miracles

            Hazrat Musa (A.S) met with Holy Prophet ﷺ on the 6 heavens. 


            421

            Before Ghazva Uhad, munafiq Abdullah Bin Ubbi leave the battlefield along with his ______ followers.

            Correct Answer: 300
            Show explanation
            Explanation

            Abu Sufyan commander the infidels in  Uhad Ghazwa

            ***

            It was fought in 3 Hijri 

            Ohad is the name of the mountain

            3000 Infidels participated in the battle of Uhad

            Abdullah ibn Ubayy decided to withdraw his 300 men before the battle of Uhad. 

            The Battle of Uhud was fought on Saturday, 23 March 625 AD, in the valley north of Mount Uhud.

            1000 Muslims participated in the battle of Uhad

            3000 Infidels participated in the battle of Uhad Infidel means کفار
            In the battle of Uhad Prophet Muhammad (PBUH) selected 50Skillful archers to stay on the mountain

            *****

            ND13-1-2023

                    425

                    Badshahi Masjid at Lahore _______ largest mosque

                    Correct Answer: 3rd
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation
                    Badshahi Masjid in Lahore is also called the Emperor's mosque
                    It is the third largest mosque
                    They were built by Emperor Aurangzeb in 1671,
                    Construction was completed in 1673
                    In 1947, as symbols of the state.
                    Architect: Nawab Zain Yar Jang Bahadur
                    Opened: 1673
                    Height: 69 m
                    Number of minarets: 8




                    426

                    Which is the greatest of all sins according to the Holy Prophet (SAW)?

                    Correct Answer: Shirk
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation
                    • Islam stocks most of the concepts of sin as their sister religions, Christianity and Judaism. The most heinous sins in Islam are known as Al-Kabirah (Arabic: كبيرة) which translates to the remarkable or principal one.
                    • A few authors use the term enormity. at the same time as every sin is seen as an offense to Allah, the al-Kaba'ir are the gravest of the offenses. Allah's electricity is idea to be best eclipsed with the aid of his mercy and accordingly minor or small sins (al-sagha'ir), are tacitly understood to be forgiven after repentance.
                    • Not every sin is same however and a few are notion to be more spiritually damning than others. The finest of the sins described as al-Kaba'ir is the association of others with Allah or Shirk.
                    427

                    Which is the most important belief in Islam after Tauheed?

                    Correct Answer: Belief in Prophethood
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation
                    • Muslims believe that God’s steerage has been revealed to humankind through especially appointed messengers, or prophets, throughout history, beginning with the first man, Adam, who's taken into consideration the 1st prophet.
                    • Twenty-5 of those prophets are noted by way of name within the Quran, consisting of Noah, Abraham, Moses, and Jesus.
                    • Muslims believe that Muhammad is the last in this line of prophets, despatched for all humankind with the message of Islam.
                    428

                    Surah Al-A’la ends with which two prophets names?

                    Correct Answer: Hazrat Ibrahim & Musa
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    The Holy Quran has 25 Prophets names mentioned and there are 6 Surahs titled with their names.

                    1.           Surah Ibrahim
                    2.           Surah Yusuf
                    3.      Surah Mohammed
                    4.           Surah Nuh
                    5.        Surah Hood
                    6.          Surah Younus (Jonah).

                    Surah Al-A’la ends with which two prophets' names? Hazrat Ibrahim & Musa

                    ND7-5-2023


                    429

                    Examples of Ijma as a slurp of Islamic Law?

                    Correct Answer: All of above
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation
                    Ijma can be operated where: The Quran and Hadith have not clarified a certain aspect of Law
                    Ijma Literally, 'consensus' or 'agreement'.

                    The names of two kinds of consensus are:

                    ijma al-ummah - a whole community consensus.

                    ijma al-aimmah - a consensus by religious authorities.

                    ND7-5-2023

                    430

                    Ijma can be operating where?

                    Correct Answer: The Quran and Hadith have not clarified a certain aspect of Law
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation
                    Ijma can be operated where: The Quran and Hadith have not clarified a certain aspect of Law
                    Ijma Literally, 'consensus' or 'agreement'.

                    The names of two kinds of consensus are:

                    ijma al-ummah - a whole community consensus.

                    ijma al-aimmah - a consensus by religious authorities.

                    ND7-5-2023

                    431

                    There are 3 Farz, 10 Sunnat and_____ Wajibat in Hajj.

                    Correct Answer: 6
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    There are 3 Farz, 10 Sunnat and 6 Wajibat in Hajj.

                    Farz in Hajj are Three (3)

                    while

                    Farz in Umrah are Four (4)

                    Hajj was made compulsory in 9 A.H.

                    • First Hajj offered in 9 A.H.

                    • Hajj ordained in Surah Bakr.

                    • The holy prophet performed only 1 Hajj in 10th A.H.

                    • There are 3 types of Hajj.

                    The verbal meaning of Hajj is The will to visit

                    ND7-5-2023




                    432

                    How many prayers have no Azan ?

                    Correct Answer: 3
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    There are the following two prayers have no Azan (آذان)

                    Eid-ul-Fitr
                    Eid-ul-Azha

                    Janaza

                    *******

                    VU CBT FIA SI ASI PAPER 13-12-2021

                    ND7-5-2023


                    433

                    Which words of the Holy Quran are not explained by a common person?

                    Correct Answer: Muqte’aat
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    these word are called Muqte’aat
                                         alif أ, hā هـ, ḥā ح, ṭā ط, yā ي, kāf ك, lām ل, mīm م, nūn ن, sīn س, ʿain ع, ṣād ص, qāf ق, rā ر.

                    434

                    Which is the second longest Surah?

                    Correct Answer: Aal-e-Amran
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    • Surah Aal-e-Amran is the second longest surah of Holy Quran. 

                      Surah Aal-e-Amran has 227 verses. 

                      Al-Baqarah is the second and longest chapter of the Quran.

                      AL-BAQARAH is named after the story of the Cow occurring in Surah (vv. 67-73).

                      ItAL-BAQARAH consists of 286 verses

                      282 verse of Al-Baqara is the longest verse of the Quran

                      The 282 verse of Surah Al Baqara is known as ayatu d-dayn

                      Al-Baqara. Position: Juz 1–3

                      Al-Baqara is Medinan surah

                      Al-Baqara. No. of Rukus: 40

                       Al-Baqara. has 25,500 letters

                      *******

                      VU CBT FIA SI ASI PAPER 13-12-2021


                    435

                    Sulah Hudabia was signed in which year

                    Correct Answer: 6 hijri
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Hudabia is a name of tree.

                    Treaty of Hudabia is written by Hazrat Ali

                    436

                    Qisas means?

                    Correct Answer: Punishment by causing similar hurt
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    “Qisas” means punishment by causing similar hurt at same part of the body of convict as he has caused to the victim or he’ casing his death if he has committed qatl-i-amd in exercise of the right of the victim or a wali.

                    Some cases of hurt are usually liable to Qisas; it can be awarded as punishment in the following offences:

                    1. Hurt

                    2. Qatl-i-Amd

                    437

                    Prophet (SAW) used to meditate in __________ before revelation.

                    Correct Answer: Mount Hira
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Prophet (SAW) used to meditate in Mount Hira before revelation.

                    رسول اللہ صلی اللہ علیہ وسلم وحی سے پہلے کوہ حرا میں مراقبہ کیا کرتے تھے۔

                    meditate غور و فکر کرنا

                    438

                    The battle of Trench was fought in which Hijrah___?

                    Correct Answer: Fifth Hijrah
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    The Battle of Khandaq (Ahzab) was fought on 5 A. H (627).

                    Ghazwa e Ahzab and Battle of the Trench is the second name of Ghazwa-e-Khandak 

                    Muslims 3000

                    Kufar 10000

                    10000 Munafiqeen were in Ghazwa-e-Khandaq


                    Additional information

                    it was the 30-day-long fight of Yathrib by Arabian and Jewish tribes

                    Hazrat Salman Al-Farsi suggests digging the trench at the time of the Battle of Khandaq

                    ***

                    439

                    In early Islam, most of the Hufaz died in the battle of ____________.

                    Correct Answer: Yamama

                    جنگ یمامہ میں قریب 1200 صحابہ شہید ہوئے جن میں قریب 70 حافظ قرآن شامل تھے۔

                    In Holy Quran Surah ‘Anqaboot’ refers to:

                    Correct Answer: Spider
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    20th para

                    Verses 69

                    Rukus 7


                    441

                    In US senate which party got majority ___

                    Correct Answer: Federalists
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    442

                    Which surah of the holy Quran gives a list of categories of the person eligible to receive zakat?

                    Correct Answer: Tauba
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    سورۃ التوبہ، (9:60) میں کہا گیا ہے کہ ’’بے شک صدقہ دینے سے مراد غریبوں اور مسکینوں کو دینا ہے"۔

                    zakat is a religious duty for all Muslims who meet the necessary criteria of wealth. 

                    Zakat literally means Purification.

                    When Zakat was made compulsory in 2 A.H.

                    The word Zakat occurs 32 times in the Holy Quran.

                    ND5-5-2023




                    443

                    Al Azhar University is the Chief centre of Islamic and Arabic learning in the world located in the?

                    Correct Answer: Cairo, Egypt
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation
                    • Al Azhar University is the Chief center of Islamic and Arabic learning in the world
                    • Located in Cairo, Egypt
                    • Established c. 972; 1051 years ago
                    • First foundation: Fatimid era
                    • 1961 – university status
                    • Founder: al-Muizz li-Din Allah
                    • Headquarters: Cairo, Egypt



                    444

                    According to Hadith, a person _____ is the best person among all.

                    Correct Answer: Having knowledge of Quran
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    تم میں سے بہترین شخص وہ ہے جو خود قرآن سیکھے اور دوسروں کو سکھائے۔

                    445

                    According to Holy Quran What is the chosen religion of Allah?

                    Correct Answer: Islam
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Arabian polytheism, the dominant form of religion in pre-Islamic Arabia, was based on veneration of deities and spirits. Worship was directed to various Gods and goddesses, including Hubal and the goddesses al-Lāt, al-'Uzzā, and Manāt, at local shrines and temples such as the Kaaba in Mecca.
                    446

                    The word Quran literally means:

                    Correct Answer: recitation
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    The word Qur'an comes from the arabic word "Qaraa" which means to read,So the Qur'an is a noun from the verb qaraa .

                    The Quran is a Holy Book that is revealed to the prophet Mohammed peace be upon him through which he was asked by Allah (God) to spread His word of peace and guidance that is known by Islam.

                    447

                    The word Takaful comes from the Arabic root word______?

                    Correct Answer: Kafala
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    The word Takaful comes from the Arabic root word Kafala, meaning “Guaranteeing each other”.

                    448

                    The pilgrim who performs Hajj-ul-Tamattu is called:

                    Correct Answer: Mutamatti
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    The pilgrim who performs Hajj-ul-Tamattu is called a Mutamatti. Hajj-ul-Tamattuj

                    It means to perform Umrah during the season of Hajj.

                    In Hajj-ul-Tamattuj a pilgrim assumes Ihram for only Umrah.

                    After reaching Makkah, he performs Tawaf and Saa’ee for Umrah.

                    He then performs Qasr (shaves or clips his hair). Here, the pilgrim has to sacrifice an animal.

                    449

                    Which term is for the longest Ayah of the Holy Quran?

                    Correct Answer: Ayat e Mudayana
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Surah-e-Baqrah has 286 Ayats and 40 Rukus

                    450

                    Which khalifa take action against those person who refuse to pay Zakat?

                    Correct Answer: Abu Bakar
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Zakat become obligatory in 2nd hijri

                    451

                    In battle of Hunain Muslims were more than ____

                    Correct Answer: Enemy
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    The Battle of Hunayn was fought against the Bedouin tribe .

                    Date 630 (8 AH)

                    Location Hunain, near al-Ta'if in south-western Arabia

                    Result Muslim victory

                    452

                    The first Msjid built by Muhammad is?

                    Correct Answer: Masjid e Quba
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Very confusing question

                    دنیا پر پہلی مسجد کا نام مسجد حرام ہے


                    Masjid-ul-Haram is the first masjid on the surface of the earth.

                    ****

                    Masjid-e-Quba is the first masjid in history of Islam.

                    اسلام کی پہلی مسجد/محمدﷺ نے جو پہلی مسجد بنائی وہ مسجد قبا تھی



                    453

                    How many pash are in Holy Quran?

                    Correct Answer: 8804
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    قرآن پاک میں 8804 پیش ہیں

                    . یہ تعداد دیگر اعداد و شمار میں شامل ہے

                    جیسے کل 6236 آیات، 114 سورتیں، اور 86430 الفاظ. 

                     

                        


                    AGM 02.05.2023

                    Which is the biggest Surah in Quran?

                    Correct Answer: Baqarah
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Al-Baqarah is the second and longest chapter of the Quran. It consists of 286 verses.

                    No. of Rukus: 40

                    Position: Juzʼ 1–3

                    455

                    Which Islamic country banned flogging in April 2020?

                    Correct Answer: Saudi Arabia
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Saudi Arabia banned flogging in April 2020.


                    سعودی عرب نے اپریل 2020 میں کوڑے مارنے کی سزا پر پابندی عائد کر دی۔

                    456

                    Which Islamic country has announced to establish ‘Friendship Association’ with India?

                    Correct Answer: Oman
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Oman, India's oldest strategic partner in West Asia, has announced to establish Oman-India Friendship Association, in what would be the first such initiative in West Asia led by the Foreign Ministry.

                    457

                    How is the fourth daughter of our Holy prophet ﷺ?

                    Correct Answer: Hazrat Fatima (رضہ)
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Hazrat Bibi Fatima is 4th daughter and 5th child of Hazrat Muhammad and Hazrat Khadija (RA)

                    She was born in Makkah on the 20th of Jumada al-Thaniya 18 B.H.

                    Title of Bibi Fatima is: Tahira, Zahra, Umm Abiha, Sayyidatu nisa-alamin and al-Batul

                    She died in Madina on 11/632 

                    She was buried in Jannat-ul-Baqi

                    Hazrat Bibi Fatima married Hazrat Ali RA ( 4th Rashidun Caliphs) in 2 AH

                    She had 2 sons and 2 daughters: 

                    1. Imam Hussain
                    2. Imam Hassan
                    3. Zaynab 
                    4. Umm Kulthum


                    Additional Information:

                    Prophet Muhammad ﷺ had three sons and four daughters.
                    1. Hazrat Qasim 
                    2. Hazrat Zainab (RA)
                    3. Hazrat Ruqayyah (RA) 
                    4. Hazrat Umm Kulthum (RA) 
                    5. Hazrat Fatima (RA) 
                    6. Hazrat Abdullah
                    7. Hazrat Ibrahim 


                    458

                    Zun-Noorain is the title of Hazrat Usman (RA). Zun-Noorain means:

                    Correct Answer: Possessor of Two Lights
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Hazrat Usman (R.A)

                    Belonged

                    Quraysh

                    Born

                    Makkah

                    Caliph

                    Third caliph

                    Caliphate

                    23 to 35 Hijjah

                    Caliphate

                    644 to 656 CE

                    Titles

                    Zun-Noorain & Jame-al-Quran

                    Martyred

                    18th Zul-Hijjah 35 A.H

                    Martyrdom day

                    Friday

                    Wives

                    Ruqayyah (RA) & Umm-e-Kulthum (RA)

                    Full Name

                    Usman bin Affaan

                    Death cause

                    Martyred by rebels

                    Hazrat Usman (RA) purchased the adjoining land for 25,000 dirham to extend Masjid-e-Nabavi.

                    Hazrat Usman used to enfranchise a slave on every Friday.

                    Muslim Navy was also developed during the period of Hazrat Usman (RA).

                     Zun-Noorain means Possessor of Two Lights

                    Jame-al-Quran means compiler of Quran. 

                    ND30-4-2023

                    463

                    Belief in the Day of Judgement & the afterlife (Akhira) is the _______ articles of faith.

                    Correct Answer: Fifth
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    the meaning of Iman Mufassal:The belief in detail

                    Seven essential beliefs are there in Iman-e-Mafassal

                    1.  Faith in God.

                    2.  Faith in holy angels.

                    3.  Faith in all holy Books.

                    4.  Faith in all holy Prophets.

                    5.  Faith in the Day of Judgement.

                    6.  Faith in everything good or bad is decided by God (Taqdir).

                    7.  Faith in life after death.

                    ***

                    AGM 02.05.2023


                    464

                    Al Quran ul Hakeem is mentioned which surah?

                    Correct Answer: Surah Yaseen
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    In the very beginning of Surah Yaseen, Allah takes an oath: By the Hakeem Quran. Allah says that the Quran is hakeem.


                    AGM 02.05.2023


                     

                    465

                    The word Islam occurs ___times in Holy Quran is:

                    Correct Answer: 10
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation
                    1. How many time Besmillah Al-Rahmaan Al-Raheem is repeated? 114.
                    2. How many Sura start with Besmillah Al-Rahmaan Al-Raheem? 113.
                    3. How many time the word 'Quran' is repeated in Holy Quran ? 70.
                    4. Which is the longest Sura of Holy Quran ? Al-Baqarah.
                    5. Which is the best drink mentioned in Holy Quran ? Milk.
                    6. The best eatable thing mentioned in Holy Quran is ? Honey.Which is the shortest Sura of Holy Quran ? Qausar

                    *******

                    The word “Islam” is used 10 times in Quran. Here are 9 verses of the Quran that mention “Islam”:

                    • Quran (2:208) : يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا ادْخُلُوا فِي السِّلْمِ كَافَّةً وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا خُطُوَاتِ الشَّيْطَانِ ۚ إِنَّهُ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّ مُّبِينٌ, 
                    • Quran (5:3) : الْيَوْمَ أَكْمَلْتُ لَكُمْ دِينَكُمْ وَأَتْمَمْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ نِعْمَتِي وَرَضِيتُ لَكُمُ الْإِسْلَامَ دِينًا ۚ , 
                    • Quran (3:19) : إِنَّ الدِّينَ عِندَ اللَّهِ الْإِسْلَامُ ۗ, 
                    • Quran (3:85) : وَمَن يَبْتَغِ غَيْرَ الْإِسْلَامِ دِينًا فَلَن يُقْبَلَ مِنْهُ وَهُوَ فِي الْآخِرَةِ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ,  
                    • Quran (6:125) : فَمَن يُرِدِ اللَّهُ أَن يَهْدِيَهُ يَشْرَحْ صَدْرَهُ لِلْإِسْلَامِ, 
                    • Quran (9:74) : يَحْلِفُونَ بِاللَّهِ مَا قَالُوا وَلَقَدْ قَالُوا كَلِمَةَ الْكُفْرِ وَكَفَرُوا بَعْدَ إِسْلَامِهِمْ وَهَمُّوا بِمَا لَمْ يَنَالُوا, 
                    • Quran (39:22) : أَفَمَن شَرَحَ اللَّهُ صَدْرَهُ لِلْإِسْلَامِ فَهُوَ عَلَىٰ نُورٍ مِّن رَّبِّهِ ۚ فَوَيْلٌ لِّلْقَاسِيَةِ قُلُوبُهُم مِّن ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ ۚ أُولَٰئِكَ فِي ضَلَالٍ مُّبِينٍ, 
                    • Quran (49:17) : يَمُنُّونَ عَلَيْكَ أَنْ أَسْلَمُوا ۖ قُل لَّا تَمُنُّوا عَلَيَّ إِسْلَامَكُم ۖ بَلِ اللَّهُ يَمُنُّ عَلَيْكُمْ أَنْ هَدَاكُمْ لِلْإِيمَانِ إِن كُنتُمْ صَادِقِينَ ,
                    • Quran (61:7) : وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّنِ افْتَرَىٰ عَلَى اللَّهِ الْكَذِبَ وَهُوَ يُدْعَىٰ إِلَى الْإِسْلَامِ ۚ وَاللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِي الْقَوْمَ الظَّالِمِينَ ,
                    466

                    Battle of Khyber was fought against?

                    Correct Answer: Jewish Tribe
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation
                    The battle of Khyber was fought against the Jewish tribe

                    It was fought between Muslims and the Jews living in the oasis of Khaybar,

                    It was fought on 7 Hijri

                    93 Jews were killed 

                    15 Muslims got martyrdom 

                    3 caliphs were martyred due to the lake of water

                    The Battle of Khaybar Result: Muslim victory

                    467

                    Who was the youngest son of Hazrat Muhammad ﷺ?

                    Correct Answer: Hazrat Ibrahim
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Ibrahim was the third (youngest) son of Hazrat Muhammad ﷺ and Hazrat Maria al-Qibtiyah (RA).

                    Ibrahim ibn Muhammad Born in Dhu al-Hijjah 8 AH 
                    He has died at the age of 2 on Shawwal 29, 10 AH

                    He was buried in Jannat al-Baqi, Medina



                    Additional Information:

                    Prophet Muhammad ﷺ had three sons and four daughters.

                    1. Hazrat Qasim 
                    2. Hazrat Zainab (RA)
                    3. Hazrat Ruqayyah (RA) 
                    4. Hazrat Umm Kulthum (RA) 
                    5. Hazrat Fatima (RA) 
                    6. Hazrat Abdullah
                    7. Hazrat Ibrahim 

                    All of his children were born to Hazrat Khadijah (RA) except one son Ibrahim, who was born to Hazrat Maria al-Qibtiyah (RA).
                    468

                    After Hazrat Umar to whom lady ,script of Musaef Abu Bakar wa handed over ? _____?

                    Correct Answer: Hazrat Hifsa
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    During the 23 years of Muhammad's time as a prophet, the verses of the Quran were memorized as they were revealed, and about 42 scribes wrote the verses on different materials such as paper, cloth, bone fragments and leather.

                    The Quran collected between two binders by Abu Bakr was transferred to Umar after he died.

                    After Umar died, it was transferred to his daughter Hazrat Hifsa

                    469

                    After Hijrat from Mecca to Madina, the Holy Prophet Muhammad’s (PBUH) camel kneeled at the door of:

                    Correct Answer: Hazrat Ayub Ansari
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Born: 576 AD, Medina, Saudi Arabia

                    Died: 674 AD, Constantinople

                    Full name: Khalid bin Zayd bin Kulay

                    470

                    The historic city of Kairouan in Tunisia was founded in 678 AD by

                    Correct Answer: Uqba bin Nafey
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    The historic city of Kairouan in Tunisia was founded in 670 AD by Uqba ibn Nafi,

                    He is an Arab general and companion of the Prophet Muhammad

                    The name "Kairouan" comes from a Persian word that means "a camp". 

                    It was the first Islamic capital in the Maghreb. 

                    The Great Mosque of Kairouan was built when the city was founded. 


                    Kairouan is located in north-central Tunisia, on the Basse Steppe (Low Steppes).

                    It is a holy city of Islam and a UNESCO World Heritage Site

                    471

                    Who was the founder and first caliph of the Umayyad Caliphate?

                    Correct Answer: Ameer Muawiyah (R.A)
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Ameer Muawiyah (R.A) was the founder and first caliph of the Umayyad Caliphate

                    He was serving from 661 until his death.

                     He became caliph less than thirty years after the death of the Islamic prophet Muhammad

                    He was appointed as the Governor of Syria after his brother, Yazid ibn Abu Sufyan, died

                    Ameer Muawiyah (R.A) established the Postal System

                    472

                    What is meant by Sila e Rahmi

                    Correct Answer: Ties of kinship
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    sila-e-rahmii is benevolent or kind relationship, kindness to kith and kin, treating the relatives well, maintenance of ties with the relations.

                    473

                    The Colour of the Flag of the Islamic Army in Ghazwa Badr was____?

                    Correct Answer: Green
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    The Colour of the Flag of the Islamic Army in Ghazwa Badr was Green, and Mslims Win.
                    474

                    The bond of "Muwakhaat" was created by the Holy Prophet (PBUH) between:

                    Correct Answer: Ansaar and Muhaajireen
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                     At the time of migration from Makkah to Madina.  

                    475

                    Consensus of opinion stands for_________?

                    Correct Answer: Ijma
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                     A  general opinion shared by all the people in a group What is the consensus of opinion among the experts?
                    476

                    Which cousin of Holy Prophet (PBUH) was Mufassar-e-Quran?

                    Correct Answer: Abdullah ibn Abbas
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Abdullah Ibn Abbas was the son of Abbas ibn Abd al-Muttalib, an uncle of the Islamic prophet Muhammad (PBHU), and a nephew of the Maymunah bint al-Harith, who later became Muhammad's wife. He was one of Muhammad's cousins and one of the early Quran scholars.

                    477

                    How many times word zakat is uesd in Makki surahs?

                    Correct Answer: 22
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Person who is liable to pay Zakat is called………… Sahib-e-Nisab
                    How many camels render are to par Zakat?                     5
                    How many goats render are to pay zakat?                     40
                    How many sheep render are to pay zakat?                     40
                    How many cows render are to pay Zakat?                     30-40
                    How many bulls render to pay Zakat?                     30-40

                    478

                    Who Represented the Quraish delegation at the Negus court the ruler of Abbissinia?

                    Correct Answer: Amr ibn al-‘As and Abdullah bin Rabiah
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Ja'far ibn Abī Tālib, who acted as the leader of the exiles, spoke in their defense. He described to the king how they lived before Islam, Muhammad's prophetic mission, and what he had taught them.

                    479

                    _____ is called the battle in which the Holy Prophet (SAW) did not participate personally.

                    Correct Answer: Sariya
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    The holy Prophet Muhammad (SAW) did not participate in, but deputed a smaller group of his companions is called “Sariya”.



                    480

                    Which surah of Quran was first revealed in the month of Ramadan?

                    Correct Answer: Baqrah
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    The month of Ramadan [is that] in which was revealed the Qur'an, a guidance for the people and clear proofs of guidance and criterion. So whoever sights [the new moon of] the month, let him fast it; and whoever is ill or on a journey - then an equal number of other days. Allah intends for you ease and does not intend for you hardship and [wants] for you to complete the period and to glorify Allah for that [to] which He has guided you; and perhaps you will be grateful. 2:185

                    481

                    Which son of Hazrat Muhammad ﷺ reached adulthood?

                    Correct Answer: None of these
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Prophet Muhammad ﷺ had three sons

                    Hazrat Qasim died at the age of only 3 

                    Hazrat Abdullah has died at the age of 4

                    Ibrahim ibn Muh has died at the age of 2 


                    Additional Information:

                    Prophet Muhammad ﷺ had three sons and four daughters.

                    1. Hazrat Qasim 
                    2. Hazrat Zainab (RA)
                    3. Hazrat Ruqayyah (RA) 
                    4. Hazrat Umm Kulthum (RA) 
                    5. Hazrat Fatima (RA) 
                    6. Hazrat Abdullah
                    7. Hazrat Ibrahim 

                    All of his children were born to Hazrat Khadijah (RA) except one son Ibrahim, who was born to Hazrat Maria al-Qibtiyah (RA).

                    482

                    In which Ghazwa the Prophet (PBUH) had to miss four prayers?

                    Correct Answer: Ditch
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    The Battle of the Trench, also known as the Battle of Khandaq and the Battle of the Confederates.


                     27-day-long defense by Muslims of Yathrib from Arab and Jewish tribes.

                    483

                    Zun-Noorain and Jame-al-Quran are title of which of the following?

                    Correct Answer: Hazrat Usman (RA)
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Hazrat Usman (R.A)

                    Belonged

                    Quraysh

                    Born

                    Makkah

                    Caliph

                    Third caliph

                    Caliphate

                    23 to 35 Hijjah

                    Caliphate

                    644 to 656 CE

                    Titles

                    Zun-Noorain & Jame-al-Quran

                    Martyred

                    18th Zul-Hijjah 35 A.H

                    Martyrdom day

                    Friday

                    Wives

                    Ruqayyah (RA) & Umm-e-Kulthum (RA)

                    Full Name

                    Usman bin Affaan

                    Death cause

                    Martyred by rebels

                    ND1-5-2023


                    484

                    Qamar Bani Hashim is the title of:

                    Correct Answer: Abbas ibn Ali
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Qamar Bani Hashim is the title of Abbas ibn Ali.

                    حضرت عباس کو قمر بنی ہاشم کیوں کہتے ہیں

                    حضرت عباس بڑے ہو کر ایک لمبے اور خوبصورت آدمی تھے۔ وہ اتنا لمبا تھا کہ گھوڑے پر بیٹھتے ہی اس کے پاؤں زمین کو چھوتے تھے۔ وہ اس قدر حسین تھے کہ قمر بنی ہاشم کے نام سے مشہور تھے،یعنی خاندان ہاشم کا چاند۔
                    485

                    حضرت ابرائیم علیہ السلام کی جگہ پیدائش کا نام بتائیں؟

                    Correct Answer: عراق
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Namrud ordered throwing Hazrat Ibrahim (A.S) into the fire

                    Nimrod, the king of Babylon, commanded his men to throw Prophet Ibrahim (AS) into a huge pit of burning fire

                    Hazrat Ibrahim A.S remained on fire for 40 days

                    Khalil Ullah is the title of Hazrat Ibrahim (A.S)

                    Hazrat Ibrahim (A.S) was born Iraq

                    Hazrat Ibrahim's (AH) name is mentioned in the Holy Quran 67 times.

                    AGM 30.4.23
                    486

                    How many States are there in America?

                    Correct Answer: 50
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    USA is a country located in North American continent. 

                    The United States is made up of a total of 50 states, plus the District of Columbia – or Washington D.C.

                    The United States also has 5 major territories and various islands.

                    487

                    تورات کس نبی پر نازل ہوئی؟

                    Correct Answer: حضرت موسی علیہ السلام
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    List of Holy books with Prophet Names

                    1-Torat Hazrat Musa

                    2- Zaboor Hazrat Dawood

                    3- Injeel  Hazrat Isa

                    4- Quran Muhammad PBUH


                    AGM 30.4.23
                    488

                    How many articles are essential to believe in for a Muslim?

                    Correct Answer: 7
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    There are seven things that are essential for a Muslim to believe in.

                    the Islamic faith is known as Iman-e-Mufassal.

                    1.  Faith in God;

                    2.  Faith in His angels;

                    3.  Faith in His revealed Books;

                    4.  Faith in all of His messengers or Prophets;

                    5.  Faith in the Last Day or the Day of Judgement;

                    6.  Faith in the doctrine of predestination, which lays down that everything good or bad is decided by God), (Taqdir) and

                    7.  Faith in life after death.

                    ND28-4-2023


                    489

                    "Usher" means:

                    Correct Answer: one tenth
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Usher and Khums are Two kinds of Tax in Islam

                    "Usher" means: one-tenth 

                    Khums means "one-fifth or 20%"

                    ND28-4-2023



                    490

                    As per Islamic vocabulary: "FIQHA" means:

                    Correct Answer: Islamic Jurisprudence
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                     Islamic Jurisprudence [FIQH] : اسلامی فقہ [FIQH]

                    the terminological meaning of 'Fiqh is "deep understanding"

                    Fiqh refers to the body of Islamic law extracted from detailed Islamic sources 


                    There are the following Five Schools of Islamic Thought.

                    1. Hanafi
                    2. Maliki
                    3. Shafi΄i
                    4. Hanbali

                    ND19-3-2023

                    491

                    Who firstly arranged and wrote the Quran on paper in book form?

                    Correct Answer: Hazart Zaid bin sabit (رضہ)
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Hazart Zaid bin sabit (رضہ)

                    Hazart Zaid bin sabit ( R.A), Born 581 Najd, Arabian Peninsula Died629 (aged 48) Mu'tah, Eastern Roman Empire
                    492

                    who from the following saved the life of the Holy Prophet in the Battle of Uhud?

                    Correct Answer: Hazrat Saad bin Abi Waqqas (R.A)
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Hazrat Saad bin Abi Waqqas (R.A) saved the life of the Holy Prophet in the Battle of Uhud.

                    لیکن کچھ مورخین کے نزدیک  حضرت طلحہ ہیں 



                    493

                    Which Surah of the Quran contains the word Allah in every verse?

                    Correct Answer: Surah Al-Mujadala
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    The surah which has mentioned Allah in every verse is Surah Al-Mujadala, meaning The Dispute.

                    There are 114 surah in Holy Quran

                    86 are Makki Surah 28 are madni surah

                    First surah revealed al Alaq

                    Last surah revealed Al Nasr"


                    494

                    Which surah of Holy Quran is also known as Qatal

                    Correct Answer: Surah Muhamad
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Muhammad  “Chapter of Muhammad” is the 47th chapter (surah) of the Quran with 38 verses (ayat).

                    495

                    What is the most Important Ebadat of Islam from the choices given below :

                    Correct Answer: Namaz
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Namaz commanded in Quran for 700 times.

                    Salat made compulsory in 10th Hijri.

                    Salat Juma became Farz in Madina.

                    496

                    Hazrat Qasim and Hazrat Abdullah sons of Hazrat Muhammad ﷺ are burried in _______________.

                    Correct Answer: Jannat al-Mu’alla
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Jannat al-Mu'alla, also known as the "Cemetery of Ma'la" and Al-Ḥajūn, is a cemetery to the north of Al-Masjid Al-Haram, and near the Mosque of the Jinn in Makkah, Saudi Arabia.
                    497

                    The marriage between Hazrat Hafsa (رضہ) and Hazrat Muhammad ﷺ took place in____?

                    Correct Answer: 3 A.H
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Hazrat Muhammad ﷺ married Hafsah in Shaaban 3AH 

                    Hazrat Hafsah was the 4th wife of Hazrat Muhammad.

                    At the time of the marriage, she was 22 years old. Muhammad was 56 years old.

                    She was the daughter of Hazrat Umar (2nd Caliph)

                    She was the First Woman “Hafiz e Quran”


                    498

                    The Literal meaning of Shirk is ?

                    Correct Answer: Partnership
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    In Islam, shirk  is the sin of idolatry are those who practice shirk, which literally means "association" and refers to accepting other gods and divinities alongside .

                    499

                    The Holy Prophet (PBUH) passed away in the age of:

                    Correct Answer: 63
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    The founder of Islam Hazrat Muhammad (PBUH) passed away at the age of 63.


                    History:

                    Holy Prophet was born in 571 A.D 22nd April (Day-Monday)

                    Mother: Amina

                    Father name Abdullah

                    Family: Quraish

                    Born in Makkah

                    Died in 632 AD

                    Prophet Muhammad ﷺ had three sons and four daughters.

                    Hazrat Muhammad PBUH Had 11th Wives.

                    500

                    The Holy prophet belongs to the family of Hazrat ___________.

                    Correct Answer: Ismail (A.S)
                    Show explanation
                    Explanation

                    Hazrat Isamil (A.S) was the son of Hazrat Ibrahim (A.S)
